title: Include touched filenames in session episode body
userStory: As a brainbot user, I want the session episode to mention which files I touched so that 'what files did I change?' is answerable semantically.
acceptanceCriteria: If the transcript contains Edit/Write tool calls, hook appends a deduped list of filenames to the episode body
First pass: filenames only (no diff text) to keep the body lean
Re-evaluation note: revisit including one-line diff summaries if recall feels thin
Verify: a session that edited two files produces an episode whose body lists both
